description: Estado de ejecucion del cron dispatcher. Actualizado por cada tick.

history.changes: Added 4 new pro comps: Riven Mid Engage, Jungle Predator Stack (Rek'Sai+Diana+Nocturne+Fizz), Vladimir Scaling, Zaahen Frontline Engage. Total: 30 comps (was 26). S-tier combo coverage: 8->15/18 (added Riven, Rek'Sai, Diana, Fizz, Garen, Rammus, Vladimir, Zaahen). Still missing: Bel'Veth, Aurelion Sol, Smolder.

Added Rek'Sai + Bel'Veth full entries to data.ts (were S-tier but missing from dataset). Both with aiAnalysis, builds, runes, counters, synergies, brokenThings, buildLinks. 16/18 S-tier now in data.ts (only Zaahen remains as CEO-added). All S-tier aiAnalysis confirmed complete.

Branch main. Working tree dirty (cosmetic).

CLEAN — 18/18 S-tier have complete counters+synergies+brokenThings. 14 dangling refs to 11 champs missing from data.ts (Udyr x3, Samira x2, Tryndamere x2, Kha'Zix, Pyke, Rengar, Gnar, Lissandra, Milio, Varus). Noted for champion-data slot.

3 fixes: totalGuides 19->20, Nasus file->fileName, stale Vel'Koz comment removed. Noted: 5 CEO-added guide entries (Ashe/Ornn/Vladimir/Fizz/Nocturne) with BA_20260614 filenames have no .md files — CEO pending. JSONs valid, images OK, no broken internal links.
